message:
fix: disable FK checks in Dolt rename to prevent dirty_issues FK violation

The Dolt UpdateIssueID failed with FK violation (Error 1451) on
fk_dirty_issue when renaming issues that had entries in dirty_issues.
Unlike SQLite (which uses PRAGMA foreign_keys = OFF), the Dolt backend
was not disabling FK checks before updating the issues PK.

Also adds missing updates for issue_snapshots, compaction_snapshots,
export_hashes, and child_counters tables (all have FK refs to issues.id).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
